posts.author: shlok.sharma (Shlok Sharma)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Everyone,

I am creating a custom form and when i was running ‘npm start run’ but it was just showing “WARN: retrying connection to the server” continuously, so i searched for this issue then i got to know that we can run the app feature using ngrok so i also installed and configured ngrok but now when i run ngrok http 3000 and after opening the local server its only showing this -

image1337×910 46.6 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there @shlok.sharma and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

It looks to me like ngrok is working since some endpoints appear to be reached correctly.

I found this article about the “Not modified” message that might help here.

Please let me know if you can find the source of the issue here!

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Cheers,
Matias
